About Us

From mobile apps to AI-first company - our journey of building technology that matters.

  1. Home
  2. Company
Our Story

From Mobile Apps to AI-First

Mobirizer was founded in 2014 as a mobile application development company in India. We built apps for startups, enterprises, and everything in between, learning what it takes to ship software that users love.

In 2019, we started experimenting with AI and machine learning. What began as small experiments quickly became our core focus as we saw the transformative potential of AI for our clients.

In 2024, we made the full pivot to become an AI-first company. Today, we build production-grade AI solutions that serve millions of users across government, education, healthcare, and enterprise sectors.

2014
Company Founded
Started as a mobile app development company in India.
2019
AI Experiments Begin
First AI projects launched, exploring conversational interfaces.
2021
D23.ai Launched
Government AI platform goes live, serving millions of citizens.
2024
AI-First Pivot
Full transition to AI-focused development studio.
Today
500+ Clients Worldwide
1000+ projects delivered, 2M+ app downloads across AI products.
Leadership

Our Leadership Team

The people driving our AI vision forward.

Naseer Ahmad

Chief Executive Officer

Leading the company's vision and strategy for AI-first transformation. Driving business development and partnerships.

Pawan Singh

Chief Product Officer

Overseeing product strategy and user experience across all AI products. Building products users love.

Rishi

Chief Technology Officer

Leading the engineering team and technical architecture. Ensuring scalability and reliability of AI systems.

Our Values

What We Believe In

The principles that guide everything we do.

Ship > Slide

We believe in working demos over presentations. Every week, we ship. Every month, we ship more. Slides don't change the world - working software does.

Boring Tech is Good Tech

We choose reliability over novelty. Our systems run on proven technologies that let us focus on solving real problems instead of fighting infrastructure.

AI Should Feel Invisible

The best AI is the AI you don't notice. We build systems that integrate seamlessly into existing workflows, making technology feel natural and effortless.

Build With, Not For

We're partners, not vendors. We build alongside our clients, understanding their context deeply and creating solutions that truly fit their needs.
